dialogos.texto_en: Alright then,\nit's finally the last day of our graduation trip!\nLet's give it our all!
This place is so beautiful.\nIt doesn't feel like Japan.
The contrast between the white buildings\nand the blue sea...
It really feels like we're at a resort!\nUmikaji Terrace is such a great spot.
Yeah, this place also feels like we're overseas!\nBut it has a different atmosphere from\nAmerican Village.
There are so many different ways to enjoy Okinawa.
Hey, everyone?\nAre you really okay with this?\nToday was supposed to be for beach-going and barbecuing.
It's fine. You should still take care,\nand we all agreed on this plan.
You're worrying too much.
And we didn't come here\njust to accommodate you, Ichika.
Huh? You didn't?
Yeah, there are still things\nwe haven't done on this trip.
Things we haven't done...
Ah, our souvenir search!
That's right!\nWe still haven't found matching souvenirs for us yet.
That's true.\nWe don't have time for a barbecue anyway.
That's right.
This place has a variety of shops,\nso it's perfect for a souvenir search.
Plus, we have to find them today.\nWe're flying out tomorrow morning.
Exactly! Right,\nlet's put some effort into finding them!
Wow, you can see the ocean from anywhere you look!\nIt's fun just to gaze at the scenery.
If you walk while looking into the distance,\nyou'll get lost, you know?
Ah, you're right, I have to be careful.\nRaiha-chan, should we hold hands?
No thanks, I'm not a kid anymore.
...Oh? Where's Uesugi-kun?
Huh? He's not here?!\nCould it be that Uesugi-san got lost?
Shall we go look for him?
Futaro-kun will be fine.\nHe'll come back on his own.
...Hehe.
Hmm? Do you have anything to say, Itsuki-chan?
No, I was just thinking that\nyou really trust Uesugi-kun, Ichika.
Yeah, you had that look on your face.\nYou looked so calm and confident\nthat he would come back to you.
D-did I have that look on my face?\nThat's embarrassing...
Hey, Ichika, how is it living with Futaro?
W-well...
It was fun, after all.\nThat's the most important thing.\nI'm just happy being by his side.
We changed rooms\nbecause you wanted to simulate living together, right?
Of course, and we did that too.\nI learned some things\nby spending time in the same room as him.
Thanks to everyone,\nI think I had a really meaningful time.
Is that so!\nThat's great, Ichika.
But there are still a lot of things I need to learn.
Learn?
Yes. Like cooking for Futaro-kun\nwhen we actually start living together.
I don't know what to say. I'm just happy\nbeing by his side%p-2;――
But, if we can be together, \nunderstand and support each other,\nwe can move forward even more.
We can't just stand still because we're happy now.
So, Nino, can you teach me how to cook next time?
Sure, but my tuition fee is high, you know?
Oh, is that so?\nThen I have to work harder as an actress.
Hey, there you are!\nYou guys went somewhere, didn't you?
Eh? Big bro,\nyou're the one who went somewhere.
No, I was checking out some souvenirs\nthat looked great\nand you guys had gone ahead without me.
Huh? Did you find something good?\nWhat did you find?
That's a surprise. You'll have to wait and see.
Oh, you're teasing us.\nThe bar has been raised, I see.
Hehehe, I'm confident I can clear that bar.\nCome on, follow me!
Okay!
Alright, let's see what you've got!
Ichika looks like she's having fun.
Yes, her smile just now\nis shining brighter\nthan anything I've seen in dramas.
It's definitely because of Fu-kun,\nthere's no doubt about that.
Yeah...
But, I won't let Futaro\nsteal our sisterly relationship away.
Of course not. Being quintuplets\nis something that will never change for us.
Yeah! Ichika will always be our big sister,\nforever and ever.
